arts.ttl: Rio Ferdinand slams decision to rule out Matthijs de Ligt opener for Man United - as pundit claims Rangers star 'folded like a pack of cards'
arts.sum: Former Man United defender Rio Ferdinand has slammed the decision to rule out a Matthijs de Ligt strike against Rangers in their crucial Europa League clash.

arts.ttl: Rio Ferdinand says he 'wouldn't have been too pleased' with Ruben Amorim's comments as a player after he branded his Man United side the 'worst' in their history
arts.sum: A furious Amorim delivered an explosive verdict on his players after they suffered a 3-1 defeat by Brighton at Old Trafford on Sunday.

arts.ttl: BREAKING: Police attend violent clashes ahead of Man Utd vs Rangers as bottles thrown in street
arts.sum: Manchester United hosted Rangers in the Europa League on Thursday night, but there were violent clashes on the streets of Manchester before the game

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim gives 'simple' reason for dropping Manchester United goalkeeper Andre Onana
arts.sum: Man United take on Rangers in the Europa League on Thursday and Ruben Amorim explained his team selection ahead of the game.

arts.ttl: Man Utd admit PSR breach risk and could inflate ticket prices even further next season
arts.sum: Ticket pricing has been a hot topic for Manchester United's supporters this season and worries over Profit and Sustainability Rules have brought the situation back into focus

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim reveals how his Man United players have responded to him branding the team 'maybe the worst in the club's history'
arts.sum: Amorim came out with the alarming comment after United suffered a seventh defeat in 15 games under their new head coach in the Premier League against Brighton on Sunday afternoon.

arts.ttl: Chelsea submit 'FORMAL' Garnacho offer to Man Utd
arts.sum: Chelsea have made a 'formal' offer for Alejandro Garnacho, with Manchester United now considering a big-money proposal to sell their wonderkid this month. Chelsea submit 'FORMAL' Garnacho offer to Man Utd

arts.ttl: Cork City snap up son of former Manchester United and England defender on-loan from Stoke City
arts.sum: The son of former Nottingham Forest, Arsenal, Manchester United and England defender Viv Anderson, the 18-year-old will spend the year at Turner’s Cross. Cork City have signed Stoke City teenager Freddie Anderson on loan until the end of the 2025 season.

arts.ttl: Team News: Man United head coach Ruben Amorim names forward in XI for Rangers showdown despite 'imminent' Chelsea offer
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim confirms his starting XI and bench for Thursday's vital Europa League contest with Rangers at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Man Utd mocked as Amad wears tracksuit with upside down badge amid club's struggles
arts.sum: Manchester United have endured a nightmare season and hit another low point this week as Amad was handed a training jacket with the club's badge printed upside-down
